body: Following up on our conversation from last week, I wanted to share a few more thoughts on the [Meridian Thermal](companies/meridian-thermal) opportunity you flagged — I've been doing some additional digging and I think the team's approach to industrial heat decarbonization is more differentiated than it initially appeared. Their modular deployment model in particular addresses a real bottleneck I've seen sink otherwise promising climate hardware plays at the Series A stage. I'd love to get on a call with you and Amara together before the partner meeting on the 18th, if that's feasible, since I think having your technical perspective in the room would strengthen the case considerably. Can you let me know your availability early next week?
